final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster inspired by the aesthetic of 大话西游, reimagined in 90s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a 90s 港片 film aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a romantic embrace as the central focal point, with two distant figures in the background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 kissing/embracing against a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a weathered city wall as the embrace backdrop, open space receding to background figures
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, melancholic 90s Hong Kong cinema atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded, slightly desaturated 90s film direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
